'''âsh-r-sh''' ('''kasharash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maa|maa]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-r-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maa|maa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-r-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kasharash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisharash|thisharash]] || [[word:jisharash|jisharash]] || [[word:shisharash|shisharash]] || [[word:kisharash|kisharash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusharash|thuthusharash]] || [[word:jujusharash|jujusharash]] || [[word:shushusharash|shushusharash]] || [[word:kukusharash|kukusharash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusharash|thusharash]] || [[word:jusharash|jusharash]] || [[word:shusharash|shusharash]] || [[word:kusharash|kusharash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusharash|thusharash]] || [[word:jusharash|jusharash]] || [[word:shusharash|shusharash]] || [[word:kusharash|kusharash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesharash|thesharash]] || [[word:jesharash|jesharash]] || [[word:shesharash|shesharash]] || [[word:kesharash|kesharash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosharash|thothosharash]] || [[word:jojosharash|jojosharash]] || [[word:shoshosharash|shoshosharash]] || [[word:kokosharash|kokosharash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosharash|thosharash]] || [[word:josharash|josharash]] || [[word:shosharash|shosharash]] || [[word:kosharash|kosharash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosharash|thosharash]] || [[word:josharash|josharash]] || [[word:shosharash|shosharash]] || [[word:kosharash|kosharash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsharash|thĂŠsharash]] || [[word:jĂŠsharash|jĂŠsharash]] || [[word:shĂŠsharash|shĂŠsharash]] || [[word:kĂŠsharash|kĂŠsharash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasharash|thathasharash]] || [[word:jajasharash|jajasharash]] || [[word:shashasharash|shashasharash]] || [[word:kakasharash|kakasharash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasharash|thasharash]] || [[word:jasharash|jasharash]] || [[word:shasharash|shasharash]] || [[word:kasharash|kasharash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasharash|thasharash]] || [[word:jasharash|jasharash]] || [[word:shasharash|shasharash]] || [[word:kasharash|kasharash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasharash|shasharash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasharash|goshasharash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasharash|gokishasharash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasharashnĂŒ|shasharashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasharashnknĂŒ|goshasharashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharashnĂŒ|gokishasharashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasharashĂ«|shasharashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasharashnkshĂ«|goshasharashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasharashĂ«|gokishasharashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharashro|shasharashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharashnkro|goshasharashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharashro|gokishasharashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharashmu|shasharashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharashnkmu|goshasharashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharashmu|gokishasharashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasharasher|shasharasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasharashnksher|goshasharashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasharasher|gokishasharasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasharashng|shasharashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasharashnkng|goshasharashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasharashng|gokishasharashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasharashya|shasharashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasharashnkya|goshasharashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasharashya|gokishasharashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasharashyam|shasharashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasharashnkyam|goshasharashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasharashyam|gokishasharashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharashnĂŒshĂ«|shasharashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasharashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasharashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharashnĂŒro|shasharashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharashnknĂŒro|goshasharashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharashnĂŒro|gokishasharashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharashnĂŒmu|shasharashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharashnknĂŒmu|goshasharashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharashnĂŒmu|gokishasharashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharashĂ«nĂŒ|shasharashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasharashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasharashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharashĂ«ro|shasharashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharashnkshĂ«ro|goshasharashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharashĂ«ro|gokishasharashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharashĂ«mu|shasharashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharashnkshĂ«mu|goshasharashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharashĂ«mu|gokishasharashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharashronĂŒ|shasharashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharashnkronĂŒ|goshasharashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharashronĂŒ|gokishasharashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharashroshĂ«|shasharashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharashnkroshĂ«|goshasharashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharashroshĂ«|gokishasharashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasharashromu|shasharashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasharashnkromu|goshasharashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasharashromu|gokishasharashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasharashmunĂŒ|shasharashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasharashnkmunĂŒ|goshasharashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasharashmunĂŒ|gokishasharashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasharashmushĂ«|shasharashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasharashnkmushĂ«|goshasharashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasharashmushĂ«|gokishasharashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasharashmuro|shasharashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasharashnkmuro|goshasharashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasharashmuro|gokishasharashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
